# geomander

Focuses on creating data sets and other tools that help make
understanding gerrymandering faster and easier. Designed for easy
preparation to run simulation analysis with the R package redist, but is
aimed at the geographic aspects of redistricting, not partitioning
methods. Most of these tools are gathered from seminar papers and do not
correspond to a single publication.

## Installation

You can install the released version of geomander from
[CRAN](https://CRAN.R-project.org) with:

``` r

install.packages("geomander")
```

And the development version from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r

# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("christopherkenny/geomander")
```

## Examples

A very common task is aggregating block data to precincts.

``` r

library(geomander)
library(tidyverse)
#> ── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
#> ✔ dplyr     1.1.4     ✔ readr     2.1.4
#> ✔ forcats   1.0.0     ✔ stringr   1.5.1
#> ✔ ggplot2   3.4.4     ✔ tibble    3.2.1
#> ✔ lubridate 1.9.3     ✔ tidyr     1.3.0
#> ✔ purrr     1.0.2     
#> ── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
#> ✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
#> ✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
#> ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors
 
# load precincts
data('va18sub')

# create block data
block <- create_block_table(state = 'VA', county = '087')  

# match the geographies
matches <- geo_match(from = block, to = va18sub)

# Aggregate
prec <- block2prec(block_table = block, matches = matches)
```

Other important tasks include breaking data into pieces by blocks
underlying them.

``` r

library(geomander)
library(tidyverse)
 
# load precincts
data("va18sub")

# subset to target area
va18sub <- va18sub |> filter(COUNTYFP == '087')
```

Then we can get common block data:

``` r

block <- create_block_table(state = 'VA', county = '087')  
```

And estimate down to blocks

``` r

disagg <- geo_estimate_down(from = va18sub, to = block, wts = block$vap, value = va18sub$G18USSRSTE)
```

For more information, see the documentation and vignettes, available at
<https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/>

# Package index

## Estimating Across Geographic Levels

Functions for approximating values at different levels of geography

- [`estimate_down()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/estimate_down.md)
  : Estimate Values Down Using Precomputed Matches
- [`estimate_up()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/estimate_up.md)
  : Aggregate Values Up Using Precomputed Matches
- [`geo_estimate_down()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/geo_estimate_down.md)
  : Estimate Values Down to a Finer Geography
- [`geo_estimate_up()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/geo_estimate_up.md)
  : Aggregate Values Up to a Larger Geography
- [`geo_match()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/geo_match.md)
  : Match Features Across Geographic Layers

## Buiding Datasets

Functions to help build and refine data

- [`block2prec()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/block2prec.md)
  : Aggregate a Block Table by Matches
- [`block2prec_by_county()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/block2prec_by_county.md)
  : Aggregate a Block Table by Matches Within County
- [`create_block_table()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/create_block_table.md)
  : Create a Census Block-Level Table
- [`create_tract_table()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/create_tract_table.md)
  : Create an ACS Tract-Level Table
- [`geo_filter()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/geo_filter.md)
  : Filter to Intersecting Pieces
- [`geo_trim()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/geo_trim.md)
  : Trim Away Small Pieces

## Downloading Datasets

Functions to help download common datasets

- [`alarm_states()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/alarm_states.md)
  : List Available States from ALARM Data
- [`clean_vest()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/clean_vest.md)
  : Clean VEST Column Names
- [`get_alarm()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/get_alarm.md)
  : Get an ALARM Dataset
- [`get_dra()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/get_dra.md)
  : Get a Dave's Redistricting App Dataset
- [`get_heda()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/get_heda.md)
  : Get a Harvard Election Data Archive ("HEDA") Dataset
- [`get_vest()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/get_vest.md)
  : Get a Voting and Election Science Team ("VEST") Dataset
- [`heda_states()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/heda_states.md)
  : List Available HEDA States
- [`vest_states()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/vest_states.md)
  : List Available VEST States

## Fixing Geographic Imperfections

Functions to help pretend that the geographies were properly connected

- [`add_edge()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/add_edge.md)
  : Add Edges to an Adjacency List
- [`adjacency()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/adjacency.md)
  : Build an Adjacency List
- [`check_contiguity()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/check_contiguity.md)
  [`cct()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/check_contiguity.md)
  [`ccm()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/check_contiguity.md)
  : Check Contiguity by Group
- [`check_polygon_contiguity()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/check_polygon_contiguity.md)
  : Check Polygon Contiguity
- [`compare_adjacencies()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/compare_adjacencies.md)
  : Compare Adjacency Lists
- [`geo_sort()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/geo_sort.md)
  : Sort Features by Northwest-to-Southeast Order
- [`split_precinct()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/split_precinct.md)
  : Split a Precinct
- [`subtract_edge()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/subtract_edge.md)
  : Remove Edges from an Adjacency List
- [`suggest_component_connection()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/suggest_component_connection.md)
  : Suggest Connections for Disconnected Groups
- [`suggest_neighbors()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/suggest_neighbors.md)
  : Suggest Neighbors for Lonely Precincts

## Format Data with Dave’s Redistricting

Functions to get maps into DRA or from DRA

- [`dra2r()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/dra2r.md)
  : Convert DRA Export Data to an R Spatial Object
- [`r2dra()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/r2dra.md)
  : Convert an R Plan to DRA Block Assignment Format

## Center of Shape

Adjusted centroids to ensure that the point is in the shape

- [`geos_centerish()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/geos_centerish.md)
  : Get the kind of center of each shape
- [`geos_circle_center()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/geos_circle_center.md)
  : Get the centroid of the maximum inscribed circle
- [`st_centerish()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/st_centerish.md)
  : Get the kind of center of each shape
- [`st_circle_center()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/st_circle_center.md)
  : Get the Center of the Maximum Inscribed Circle

## Tools for working with borders

Functions that deal with two sides of a seam between two administrative
units

- [`seam_adj()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/seam_adj.md)
  : Filter Adjacency to the Edges Along a Seam
- [`seam_geom()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/seam_geom.md)
  : Filter Shapes to Units Along a Seam
- [`seam_rip()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/seam_rip.md)
  : Remove Edges Across an Administrative Boundary
- [`seam_sew()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/seam_sew.md)
  : Suggest Edges to Sew a Seam

## Spatial Autocorrelation

Functions to measure local and global autocorrelation measures

- [`global_gearys()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/global_gearys.md)
  : Compute Global Geary's C
- [`global_morans()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/global_morans.md)
  : Compute Global Moran's I
- [`gstar_i()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/gstar_i.md)
  : Compute Standardized Getis-Ord G\*i
- [`local_gearys()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/local_gearys.md)
  : Compute Local Geary's C
- [`local_morans()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/local_morans.md)
  : Compute Local Moran's I

## Included Example Data

- [`checkerboard`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/checkerboard.md)
  : Checkerboard
- [`checkerboard_adj`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/checkerboard_adj.md)
  : Checkerboard Adjacency
- [`nrcsd`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/nrcsd.md)
  : nrcsd
- [`orange`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/orange.md)
  : orange
- [`precincts`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/precincts.md)
  : precincts
- [`rockland`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/rockland.md)
  : rockland
- [`towns`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/towns.md)
  : towns
- [`va18sub`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/va18sub.md)
  : va18sub
- [`va_blocks`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/va_blocks.md)
  : va_blocks
- [`va_blocks`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/va_vtd.md)
  : va_vtd

## Plotting Functions

- [`geo_plot()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/geo_plot.md)
  :

  Plot an `sf` Object with Row Numbers

- [`geo_plot_group()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/geo_plot_group.md)
  : Plot Groups with Connected Components Colored

## Leftovers

Functions that don’t really fit elsewhere

- [`geomander-package`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/geomander-package.md)
  [`geomander`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/geomander-package.md)
  : Geographic Tools for Studying Gerrymandering
- [`baf_to_vtd()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/baf_to_vtd.md)
  : Estimate Plans from a Block Assignment File to Voting Districts
- [`count_connections()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/count_connections.md)
  : Count How Often Pairs of Units Share a District
- [`get_lewis()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/get_lewis.md)
  : Get Historical United States Congressional District Shapefiles
- [`get_rpvnearme()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/get_rpvnearme.md)
  : Get the RPV Near Me Dataset
- [`regionalize()`](https://christophertkenny.com/geomander/reference/regionalize.md)
  : Estimate Regions Separated by Geographic Features
